description: Alpine shared regulatory catalogue — canonical federal / PR-local / NCQA authorities governing Puerto Rico Medicaid (Plan Vital) health-plan operations. Consumed by all Alpine apps.

authorities.title: Medicaid Managed Care
authorities.summary: Governing federal regulation for Medicaid managed care contracts (MCO/PIHP/PAHP). Subpart E is the quality core. Applies to PR territories.
authorities.title_es: Cuidado Coordinado de Medicaid (Managed Care)
authorities.summary_en: Governing federal regulation for Medicaid managed care contracts (MCO/PIHP/PAHP). Subpart E is the quality core. Applies to PR territories.
authorities.summary_es: Reglamento federal que rige los contratos de cuidado coordinado de Medicaid (MCO/PIHP/PAHP). El Subpart E es el núcleo de calidad. Aplica a los territorios, incluido PR.

authorities.title: State monitoring requirements
authorities.summary: State must monitor all managed-care programs: enrollee services, grievances/appeals, network adequacy, quality, financials, encounter data, and use of measures/PIPs; annual monitoring + readiness review.
authorities.title_es: Requisitos de monitoreo estatal
authorities.summary_en: State must monitor all managed-care programs: enrollee services, grievances/appeals, network adequacy, quality, financials, encounter data, and use of measures/PIPs; annual monitoring + readiness review.
authorities.summary_es: El Estado debe monitorear todos los programas de managed care: servicios al afiliado, quejas/apelaciones, adecuación de red, calidad, finanzas, datos de encuentros y uso de medidas/PIPs; monitoreo anual + revisión de preparación (readiness).

authorities.title: Health information systems
authorities.summary: MCO must maintain a health information system that collects, analyzes, integrates and reports data; ensures encounter-data accuracy and completeness. Basis for IS/data-integration duties.
authorities.title_es: Sistemas de información de salud
authorities.summary_en: MCO must maintain a health information system that collects, analyzes, integrates and reports data; ensures encounter-data accuracy and completeness. Basis for IS/data-integration duties.
authorities.summary_es: La MCO debe mantener un sistema de información de salud que recopile, analice, integre y reporte datos; asegura la exactitud e integridad de los datos de encuentros. Base de los deberes de IS/integración de datos.

authorities.title: Quality Assessment & Performance Improvement (QAPI)
authorities.summary: MCO must run an ongoing QAPI: collect/submit performance-measure data, conduct PIPs, detect under/over-utilization, and address enrollees with special health-care needs.
authorities.title_es: Evaluación de Calidad y Mejora del Desempeño (QAPI)
authorities.summary_en: MCO must run an ongoing QAPI: collect/submit performance-measure data, conduct PIPs, detect under/over-utilization, and address enrollees with special health-care needs.
authorities.summary_es: La MCO debe operar un QAPI continuo: recopilar/someter datos de medidas de desempeño, realizar PIPs, detectar sub/sobre-utilización y atender a los afiliados con necesidades especiales de salud.

authorities.title: Managed care State quality strategy
authorities.summary: State must maintain a written quality strategy (measures, targets, PIPs, disparity reduction, EQR arrangements); public comment; review ≥ every 3 years.
authorities.title_es: Estrategia estatal de calidad de managed care
authorities.summary_en: State must maintain a written quality strategy (measures, targets, PIPs, disparity reduction, EQR arrangements); public comment; review ≥ every 3 years.
authorities.summary_es: El Estado debe mantener una estrategia de calidad escrita (medidas, metas, PIPs, reducción de disparidades, arreglos de EQR); comentario público; revisión ≥ cada 3 años.

authorities.title: External Quality Review (EQR)
authorities.summary: State must ensure a qualified EQRO performs an annual EQR of each contracting MCO/PIHP.
authorities.title_es: Revisión Externa de Calidad (EQR)
authorities.summary_en: State must ensure a qualified EQRO performs an annual EQR of each contracting MCO/PIHP.
authorities.summary_es: El Estado debe asegurar que un EQRO cualificado realice una EQR anual de cada MCO/PIHP contratada.

authorities.title: Activities related to EQR
authorities.summary: Mandatory EQR activities: validation of performance measures, validation of PIPs, compliance review (every 3 yrs), and network-adequacy validation; plus optional activities.
authorities.title_es: Actividades relacionadas con la EQR
authorities.summary_en: Mandatory EQR activities: validation of performance measures, validation of PIPs, compliance review (every 3 yrs), and network-adequacy validation; plus optional activities.
authorities.summary_es: Actividades obligatorias de EQR: validación de medidas de desempeño, validación de PIPs, revisión de cumplimiento (cada 3 años) y validación de adecuación de red; más actividades opcionales.

authorities.title: EQR results / annual technical report
authorities.summary: State must produce an annual public EQR technical report on access/quality with plan-specific strengths, weaknesses, recommendations; posted by April 30.
authorities.title_es: Resultados de EQR / informe técnico anual
authorities.summary_en: State must produce an annual public EQR technical report on access/quality with plan-specific strengths, weaknesses, recommendations; posted by April 30.
authorities.summary_es: El Estado debe producir un informe técnico público anual de EQR sobre acceso/calidad con fortalezas, debilidades y recomendaciones por plan; publicado antes del 30 de abril.

authorities.title: Medicaid/CHIP Quality Rating System (MAC QRS)
authorities.summary: Mandatory Quality Rating System framework, mandatory measure set, methodology, and public one-stop-shop display (2024 rule).
authorities.title_es: Sistema de Clasificación de Calidad de Medicaid/CHIP (MAC QRS)
authorities.summary_en: Mandatory Quality Rating System framework, mandatory measure set, methodology, and public one-stop-shop display (2024 rule).
authorities.summary_es: Marco obligatorio de Quality Rating System, conjunto de medidas obligatorio, metodología y despliegue público de ventanilla única (regla de 2024).

authorities.title: Network adequacy standards
authorities.summary: Time/distance and other network-adequacy standards; validated as a mandatory EQR activity (2023 protocol).
authorities.title_es: Estándares de adecuación de red
authorities.summary_en: Time/distance and other network-adequacy standards; validated as a mandatory EQR activity (2023 protocol).
authorities.summary_es: Estándares de tiempo/distancia y otros de adecuación de red; validados como actividad obligatoria de EQR (protocolo de 2023).

authorities.title: Information requirements for enrollees
authorities.summary: Enrollee information standards including language access (Spanish for PR Medicaid) and alternate formats.
authorities.title_es: Requisitos de información para afiliados
authorities.summary_en: Enrollee information standards including language access (Spanish for PR Medicaid) and alternate formats.
authorities.summary_es: Estándares de información al afiliado, incluyendo acceso lingüístico (español para el Medicaid de PR) y formatos alternos.

authorities.title: Mental health / substance use parity
authorities.summary: Applies MHPAEA parity to Medicaid managed care (financial requirements, treatment limitations, NQTLs).
authorities.title_es: Paridad de salud mental / uso de sustancias
authorities.summary_en: Applies MHPAEA parity to Medicaid managed care (financial requirements, treatment limitations, NQTLs).
authorities.summary_es: Aplica la paridad de MHPAEA al managed care de Medicaid (requisitos financieros, límites de tratamiento, NQTLs).

authorities.title: Mandatory Medicaid/CHIP Core Set reporting
authorities.summary: Mandatory annual reporting of the Child Core Set and behavioral-health Adult measures in a standardized format.
authorities.title_es: Reporte obligatorio del Core Set de Medicaid/CHIP
authorities.summary_en: Mandatory annual reporting of the Child Core Set and behavioral-health Adult measures in a standardized format.
authorities.summary_es: Reporte anual obligatorio del Child Core Set y de las medidas de salud conductual del Adult Core Set en un formato estandarizado.

authorities.title: EPSDT — Early & Periodic Screening, Diagnostic & Treatment
authorities.summary: Child preventive-services benefit; CMS-416 annual reporting.
authorities.title_en: EPSDT — Early & Periodic Screening, Diagnostic & Treatment
authorities.title_es: EPSDT — Cernimiento, Diagnóstico y Tratamiento Temprano y Periódico
authorities.summary_en: Child preventive-services benefit; CMS-416 annual reporting.
authorities.summary_es: Beneficio de servicios preventivos para menores; reporte anual CMS-416.

authorities.title: Child Core Set mandatory (BBA 2018)
authorities.summary: Bipartisan Budget Act of 2018 makes annual Child Core Set reporting mandatory beginning FFY 2024.
authorities.title_es: Child Core Set obligatorio (BBA 2018)
authorities.summary_en: Bipartisan Budget Act of 2018 makes annual Child Core Set reporting mandatory beginning FFY 2024.
authorities.summary_es: La Ley Bipartita de Presupuesto de 2018 hace obligatorio el reporte anual del Child Core Set a partir del FFY 2024.

authorities.title: Behavioral-health Adult measures mandatory
authorities.summary: Makes BH measures of the Adult Core Set mandatory beginning FFY 2024; remaining adult measures voluntary.
authorities.title_es: Medidas de salud conductual del Adult Core Set obligatorias
authorities.summary_en: Makes BH measures of the Adult Core Set mandatory beginning FFY 2024; remaining adult measures voluntary.
authorities.summary_es: Hace obligatorias las medidas de salud conductual del Adult Core Set a partir del FFY 2024; las demás medidas de adultos son voluntarias.

authorities.title: 2024 Managed Care "Access, Finance & Quality" Final Rule
authorities.summary: Establishes MAC QRS (Subpart G), adds network-adequacy EQR validation, transparency; effective Jul 9, 2024.
authorities.title_en: 2024 Managed Care "Access, Finance & Quality" Final Rule
authorities.title_es: Regla Final 2024 de Managed Care ("Acceso, Finanzas y Calidad")
authorities.summary_en: Establishes MAC QRS (Subpart G), adds network-adequacy EQR validation, transparency; effective Jul 9, 2024.
authorities.summary_es: Establece el MAC QRS (Subpart G), añade la validación de adecuación de red en EQR y transparencia; vigente el 9 de julio de 2024.

authorities.title: Mandatory Medicaid/CHIP Core Set Reporting rule
authorities.summary: Implements mandatory annual Child Core Set + BH Adult measure reporting mechanics and phased content.
authorities.title_en: Mandatory Medicaid/CHIP Core Set Reporting rule
authorities.title_es: Regla de reporte obligatorio del Core Set de Medicaid/CHIP
authorities.summary_en: Implements mandatory annual Child Core Set + BH Adult measure reporting mechanics and phased content.
authorities.summary_es: Implementa la mecánica y el contenido escalonado del reporte anual obligatorio del Child Core Set + medidas de salud conductual de adultos.

authorities.title: Initial Core Set Mandatory Reporting Guidance
authorities.summary: State Health Official letter confirming Child Core Set + BH Adult measures mandatory starting FFY 2024.
authorities.title_en: Initial Core Set Mandatory Reporting Guidance
authorities.title_es: Guía inicial de reporte obligatorio del Core Set
authorities.summary_en: State Health Official letter confirming Child Core Set + BH Adult measures mandatory starting FFY 2024.
authorities.summary_es: Carta a Oficiales de Salud Estatales que confirma que el Child Core Set + las medidas de salud conductual de adultos son obligatorios a partir del FFY 2024.

authorities.title: External Quality Review Protocols
authorities.summary: Standardized methods for each EQR activity (PIP validation, PM validation, compliance, network adequacy).
authorities.title_es: Protocolos de Revisión Externa de Calidad
authorities.summary_en: Standardized methods for each EQR activity (PIP validation, PM validation, compliance, network adequacy).
authorities.summary_es: Métodos estandarizados para cada actividad de EQR (validación de PIP, validación de PM, cumplimiento, adecuación de red).

authorities.title: Medicaid Managed Care Final Rules (2016, 2020)
authorities.summary: Created the modern QAPI/quality-strategy/EQR architecture (2016) and rebalanced oversight/flexibility (2020).
authorities.title_es: Reglas Finales de Managed Care de Medicaid (2016, 2020)
authorities.summary_en: Created the modern QAPI/quality-strategy/EQR architecture (2016) and rebalanced oversight/flexibility (2020).
authorities.summary_es: Crearon la arquitectura moderna de QAPI/estrategia de calidad/EQR (2016) y rebalancearon supervisión/flexibilidad (2020).

authorities.title: Territory Medicaid funding cap / FMAP
authorities.summary: PR Medicaid funded via annual federal cap plus enhanced funds (FMAP 76% through 9/30/2027); does not reduce Part 438 quality duties.
authorities.title_es: Tope de fondos de Medicaid para territorios / FMAP
authorities.summary_en: PR Medicaid funded via annual federal cap plus enhanced funds (FMAP 76% through 9/30/2027); does not reduce Part 438 quality duties.
authorities.summary_es: El Medicaid de PR se financia con un tope federal anual más fondos mejorados (FMAP 76% hasta el 30/9/2027); no reduce los deberes de calidad del Part 438.

authorities.title: HIPAA Privacy Rule
authorities.summary: PHI use/disclosure, minimum necessary, Business Associate requirements.
authorities.title_es: Regla de Privacidad de HIPAA
authorities.summary_en: PHI use/disclosure, minimum necessary, Business Associate requirements.
authorities.summary_es: Uso/divulgación de PHI, mínimo necesario y requisitos de Socio Comercial (Business Associate).

authorities.title: HIPAA Security Rule — technical safeguards
authorities.summary: Access control, audit controls, integrity, and transmission security for ePHI. Basis for the app's audit trail.
authorities.title_es: Regla de Seguridad de HIPAA — salvaguardas técnicas
authorities.summary_en: Access control, audit controls, integrity, and transmission security for ePHI. Basis for the app's audit trail.
authorities.summary_es: Control de acceso, controles de auditoría, integridad y seguridad de transmisión de ePHI. Base del registro de auditoría de la app.

authorities.title: HIPAA Transactions & Code Sets (X12)
authorities.summary: Standard EDI transactions (837, 835, 999, 277CA) and code sets used for claims/encounters/remittances.
authorities.title_es: Transacciones y Conjuntos de Códigos de HIPAA (X12)
authorities.summary_en: Standard EDI transactions (837, 835, 999, 277CA) and code sets used for claims/encounters/remittances.
authorities.summary_es: Transacciones EDI estándar (837, 835, 999, 277CA) y conjuntos de códigos usados para claims/encuentros/remesas.

authorities.title: Ley de la Administración de Seguros de Salud (ASES)
authorities.summary: Creates ASES/PRHIA — the public corporation that contracts, supervises and evaluates the MCOs delivering Plan Vital. Statutory basis for all quality/reporting obligations.
authorities.title_es: Ley de la Administración de Seguros de Salud (ASES)
authorities.summary_en: Creates ASES/PRHIA — the public corporation that contracts, supervises and evaluates the MCOs delivering Plan Vital. Statutory basis for all quality/reporting obligations.
authorities.summary_es: Crea a ASES/PRHIA — la corporación pública que contrata, supervisa y evalúa a las MCO que entregan Plan Vital. Base estatutaria de todas las obligaciones de calidad/reporte.

authorities.title: First Medical Plan Vital MCO Contract (2023–2025)
authorities.summary: The operative MCO instrument: covered benefits, capitation (HCHN carve-in), encounter data, quality/HEDIS reporting (§12, §18.2), grievances/appeals, network adequacy.
authorities.title_en: First Medical Plan Vital MCO Contract (2023–2025)
authorities.title_es: Contrato MCO First Medical Plan Vital (2023–2025)
authorities.summary_en: The operative MCO instrument: covered benefits, capitation (HCHN carve-in), encounter data, quality/HEDIS reporting (§12, §18.2), grievances/appeals, network adequacy.
authorities.summary_es: El instrumento operativo de la MCO: beneficios cubiertos, capitación (carve-in HCHN), datos de encuentros, reporte de calidad/HEDIS (§12, §18.2), quejas/apelaciones, adecuación de red.

authorities.citation: PR Medicaid Managed Care Quality Strategy (10-21-24)
authorities.title: PR Medicaid & CHIP Managed Care Quality Strategy
authorities.summary: CMS-required §438.340 strategy: required HEDIS measure set, HCIP withhold, PIP topics, CAHPS/ECHO, EQRO protocols. The single best authoritative map.
authorities.title_en: PR Medicaid & CHIP Managed Care Quality Strategy
authorities.title_es: Estrategia de Calidad de Managed Care de Medicaid y CHIP de PR
authorities.summary_en: CMS-required §438.340 strategy: required HEDIS measure set, HCIP withhold, PIP topics, CAHPS/ECHO, EQRO protocols. The single best authoritative map.
authorities.summary_es: Estrategia §438.340 requerida por CMS: conjunto de medidas HEDIS requerido, retención HCIP, temas de PIP, CAHPS/ECHO, protocolos del EQRO. El mejor mapa autoritativo único.

authorities.title: Plan Vital Reporting Guide
authorities.summary: Catalogue of MCO reports/formats/frequencies/deadlines: Report 24 Audited HEDIS, 26 Core Measures, 22 HCIP (qtrly), 13 CMS-416 EPSDT, 12 Encounter Data.
authorities.title_es: Guía de Reportes de Plan Vital (Anejo 12, v.09)
authorities.summary_en: Catalogue of MCO reports/formats/frequencies/deadlines: Report 24 Audited HEDIS, 26 Core Measures, 22 HCIP (qtrly), 13 CMS-416 EPSDT, 12 Encounter Data.
authorities.summary_es: Catálogo de reportes/formatos/frecuencias/fechas límite de la MCO: Reporte 24 HEDIS auditado, 26 Core Measures, 22 HCIP (trimestral), 13 CMS-416 EPSDT, 12 Datos de Encuentros.

authorities.title: Required HEDIS measure set (ASES policy letter)
authorities.summary: ASES normative letter communicating the required HEDIS measure set (per HEDIS MY Vol. 2) captured in Report 24. Binding policy guidance.
authorities.title_en: Required HEDIS measure set (ASES policy letter)
authorities.title_es: Conjunto de medidas HEDIS requerido (carta normativa de ASES)
authorities.summary_en: ASES normative letter communicating the required HEDIS measure set (per HEDIS MY Vol. 2) captured in Report 24. Binding policy guidance.
authorities.summary_es: Carta normativa de ASES que comunica el conjunto de medidas HEDIS requerido (según HEDIS MY Vol. 2), captado en el Reporte 24. Guía de política vinculante.

authorities.title: Health Care Improvement Program (quality withhold)
authorities.summary: Quality withhold: ~2% of the admin fee earned back quarterly on benchmark targets across Healthy People, Chronic Conditions, and a third initiative. Reported via Report 22.
authorities.title_es: Programa de Mejoramiento del Cuidado de la Salud (retención de calidad)
authorities.summary_en: Quality withhold: ~2% of the admin fee earned back quarterly on benchmark targets across Healthy People, Chronic Conditions, and a third initiative. Reported via Report 22.
authorities.summary_es: Retención de calidad: ~2% del honorario administrativo que se recupera trimestralmente al cumplir metas de referencia en Healthy People, Condiciones Crónicas y una tercera iniciativa. Se reporta vía Reporte 22.

authorities.title: PR External Quality Review Annual Technical Report
authorities.summary: Mercer (EQRO since 2022) validates PIPs, performance measures and HEDIS for the GHP MCOs incl. FMHP; demonstrates §438.350–.364 compliance.
authorities.title_en: PR External Quality Review Annual Technical Report
authorities.title_es: Informe Técnico Anual de Revisión Externa de Calidad de PR
authorities.summary_en: Mercer (EQRO since 2022) validates PIPs, performance measures and HEDIS for the GHP MCOs incl. FMHP; demonstrates §438.350–.364 compliance.
authorities.summary_es: Mercer (EQRO desde 2022) valida los PIPs, las medidas de desempeño y HEDIS para las MCO del GHP, incluida FMHP; evidencia el cumplimiento de §438.350–.364.

authorities.title: APR DRG inpatient pricing readiness attestation
authorities.summary: Go-live Oct 1, 2025: inpatient DRG pricing (Solventum) — P&Ps, coding support, system testing, CARC/RARC, encounter→MMIS. Tracked in the Readiness Tracker.
authorities.title_en: APR DRG inpatient pricing readiness attestation
authorities.title_es: Certificación de preparación para la facturación por APR DRG de internación
authorities.summary_en: Go-live Oct 1, 2025: inpatient DRG pricing (Solventum) — P&Ps, coding support, system testing, CARC/RARC, encounter→MMIS. Tracked in the Readiness Tracker.
authorities.summary_es: Go-live 1 de octubre de 2025: facturación por DRG de internación (Solventum) — P&P, apoyo de codificación, pruebas de sistema, CARC/RARC, encuentro→MMIS. Se rastrea en el Readiness Tracker.

authorities.title: Código de Seguros — Pago Puntual / Clean Claims
authorities.summary: Clean-claim + prompt-payment mandate: 30-day payment window, 90-day provider filing, 15-day deficiency notice, interest on late pay. Applies to MCOs (HSOs).
authorities.title_en: Insurance Code — Prompt Payment / Clean Claims
authorities.title_es: Código de Seguros — Pago Puntual / Reclamaciones Limpias
authorities.summary_en: Clean-claim + prompt-payment mandate: 30-day payment window, 90-day provider filing, 15-day deficiency notice, interest on late pay. Applies to MCOs (HSOs).
authorities.summary_es: Mandato de reclamación limpia + pago puntual: ventana de pago de 30 días, radicación del proveedor en 90 días, notificación de deficiencia en 15 días, interés por pago tardío. Aplica a las MCO (HSO).

authorities.title: Código de Seguros — Organizaciones de Servicios de Salud (HSO)
authorities.summary: Licensing/solvency framework for Health Service Organizations — the corporate form MCOs operate under, regulated by OCS.
authorities.title_es: Código de Seguros — Organizaciones de Servicios de Salud (HSO)
authorities.summary_en: Licensing/solvency framework for Health Service Organizations — the corporate form MCOs operate under, regulated by OCS.
authorities.summary_es: Marco de licenciamiento/solvencia para las Organizaciones de Servicios de Salud — la forma corporativa bajo la cual operan las MCO, regulada por la OCS.

authorities.title: Prompt-pay / clean-claim amendments
authorities.summary: Establish and tighten prompt-payment: standardized clean-claim definition, uniform 30-day rule, telemedicine-as-in-person, Art. 30.040 amendments.
authorities.title_es: Enmiendas de pago puntual / reclamación limpia
authorities.summary_en: Establish and tighten prompt-payment: standardized clean-claim definition, uniform 30-day rule, telemedicine-as-in-person, Art. 30.040 amendments.
authorities.summary_es: Establecen y endurecen el pago puntual: definición estandarizada de reclamación limpia, regla uniforme de 30 días, telemedicina como presencial, enmiendas al Art. 30.040.

authorities.title: Código de Seguros de Salud de PR
authorities.summary: Health-insurance consumer code: member protections, coverage definitions, internal/external appeals, transparency.
authorities.title_es: Código de Seguros de Salud de PR
authorities.summary_en: Health-insurance consumer code: member protections, coverage definitions, internal/external appeals, transparency.
authorities.summary_es: Código de consumo de seguros de salud: protecciones al afiliado, definiciones de cubierta, apelaciones internas/externas, transparencia.

authorities.title: Carta de Derechos y Responsabilidades del Paciente
authorities.summary: Patient bill of rights binding on health plans: quality care, non-discrimination, 24/7 ER access without prior auth, privacy, informed consent, continuity of care.
authorities.title_en: Patient Bill of Rights and Responsibilities
authorities.title_es: Carta de Derechos y Responsabilidades del Paciente
authorities.summary_en: Patient bill of rights binding on health plans: quality care, non-discrimination, 24/7 ER access without prior auth, privacy, informed consent, continuity of care.
authorities.summary_es: Carta de derechos del paciente vinculante para los planes de salud: cuidado de calidad, no discriminación, acceso a sala de emergencias 24/7 sin preautorización, privacidad, consentimiento informado, continuidad del cuidado.

authorities.title: Ley de Salud Mental de PR
authorities.summary: Mental-health code: MH Bill of Rights, service procedures, consent, and managed-care alignment. Foundational for BH measures and member rights.
authorities.title_es: Ley de Salud Mental de PR
authorities.summary_en: Mental-health code: MH Bill of Rights, service procedures, consent, and managed-care alignment. Foundational for BH measures and member rights.
authorities.summary_es: Código de salud mental: Carta de Derechos de salud mental, procedimientos de servicio, consentimiento y alineación con managed care. Fundamento de las medidas de salud conductual y los derechos del afiliado.

authorities.title: OCS — Insurance Commissioner authority & reglamentos
authorities.summary: Enforces the Insurance Code, licenses insurers/HSOs, sets clean-claim/prompt-pay standards, adjudicates non-payment complaints.
authorities.title_es: OCS — Autoridad y reglamentos del Comisionado de Seguros
authorities.summary_en: Enforces the Insurance Code, licenses insurers/HSOs, sets clean-claim/prompt-pay standards, adjudicates non-payment complaints.
authorities.summary_es: Hace cumplir el Código de Seguros, licencia a aseguradores/HSO, fija estándares de reclamación limpia/pago puntual, adjudica querellas por falta de pago.

authorities.title: Ley de Transparencia y Acceso a la Información Pública
authorities.summary: PR public-records / FOIA-equivalent — how to obtain ASES/OCS public records (contracts, quality strategies, reglamentos).
authorities.title_en: Transparency and Access to Public Information Act
authorities.title_es: Ley de Transparencia y Acceso a la Información Pública
authorities.summary_en: PR public-records / FOIA-equivalent — how to obtain ASES/OCS public records (contracts, quality strategies, reglamentos).
authorities.summary_es: Equivalente de PR al FOIA / acceso a récords públicos — cómo obtener récords públicos de ASES/OCS (contratos, estrategias de calidad, reglamentos).

authorities.title: Technical Specifications for Health Plans
authorities.summary: Per-measure technical spec: eligible population, numerator/denominator, exclusions, admin/hybrid logic, sampling. Required to compute/submit HEDIS. Annual, licensed.
authorities.title_es: Especificaciones Técnicas para Planes de Salud
authorities.summary_en: Per-measure technical spec: eligible population, numerator/denominator, exclusions, admin/hybrid logic, sampling. Required to compute/submit HEDIS. Annual, licensed.
authorities.summary_es: Especificación técnica por medida: población elegible, numerador/denominador, exclusiones, lógica administrativa/híbrida, muestreo. Requerida para computar/someter HEDIS. Anual, licenciada.

authorities.title: Value Set Directory
authorities.summary: Code tables (CPT/HCPCS/LOINC/ICD-10/SNOMED) crosswalked to each measure. Licensed, per MY.
authorities.title_es: Directorio de Conjuntos de Valores (Value Set Directory)
authorities.summary_en: Code tables (CPT/HCPCS/LOINC/ICD-10/SNOMED) crosswalked to each measure. Licensed, per MY.
authorities.summary_es: Tablas de códigos (CPT/HCPCS/LOINC/ICD-10/SNOMED) cruzadas con cada medida. Licenciada, por MY.

authorities.title: Compliance Audit — Standards, Policies & Procedures
authorities.summary: The only NCQA-approved audit methodology: IS capabilities (IS 1–7), measure-compliance evaluation, MRRV, result designations. Licensed.
authorities.title_es: Auditoría de Cumplimiento — Normas, Políticas y Procedimientos
authorities.summary_en: The only NCQA-approved audit methodology: IS capabilities (IS 1–7), measure-compliance evaluation, MRRV, result designations. Licensed.
authorities.summary_es: La única metodología de auditoría aprobada por NCQA: capacidades de IS (IS 1–7), evaluación de cumplimiento de medidas, MRRV, designaciones de resultado. Licenciada.

authorities.title: HEDIS Compliance Audit program (IS 1–7)
authorities.summary: Two-part audit (IS capabilities + measure review) by a Certified HEDIS Compliance Auditor; required before rates are reportable.
authorities.title_es: Programa de Auditoría de Cumplimiento HEDIS (IS 1–7)
authorities.summary_en: Two-part audit (IS capabilities + measure review) by a Certified HEDIS Compliance Auditor; required before rates are reportable.
authorities.summary_es: Auditoría en dos partes (capacidades de IS + revisión de medidas) por un Auditor Certificado de Cumplimiento HEDIS; requerida antes de que las tasas sean reportables.

authorities.title: Measure Certification (test decks)
authorities.summary: Per-measure, per-year certification: run NCQA test decks through the engine; NCQA compares to expected results and issues a seal.
authorities.title_es: Certificación de Medidas (test decks)
authorities.summary_en: Per-measure, per-year certification: run NCQA test decks through the engine; NCQA compares to expected results and issues a seal.
authorities.summary_es: Certificación por medida y por año: se corren los test decks de NCQA por el motor; NCQA compara con los resultados esperados y emite un sello.

authorities.title: Digital HEDIS measure packages (FHIR + CQL)
authorities.summary: Official machine-readable HEDIS measures in FHIR/CQL for direct execution (the engine's measure logic). Subscription.
authorities.title_es: Paquetes de medidas HEDIS digitales (FHIR + CQL)
authorities.summary_en: Official machine-readable HEDIS measures in FHIR/CQL for direct execution (the engine's measure logic). Subscription.
authorities.summary_es: Medidas HEDIS oficiales legibles por máquina en FHIR/CQL para ejecución directa (la lógica de medidas del motor). Por suscripción.

authorities.title: Electronic Clinical Data Systems reporting
authorities.summary: Full-population, non-sampled reporting from structured electronic clinical data via FHIR; replaces hybrid as measures go digital.
authorities.title_es: Reporte por Sistemas Electrónicos de Datos Clínicos (ECDS)
authorities.summary_en: Full-population, non-sampled reporting from structured electronic clinical data via FHIR; replaces hybrid as measures go digital.
authorities.summary_es: Reporte de población completa, sin muestreo, a partir de datos clínicos electrónicos estructurados vía FHIR; reemplaza el método híbrido a medida que las medidas se digitalizan.

authorities.title: DAV & supplemental-data / PSV rules
authorities.summary: Validated data streams count as standard supplemental data (skip PSV); non-standard data requires Primary Source Verification.
authorities.title_es: DAV y reglas de datos suplementarios / PSV
authorities.summary_en: Validated data streams count as standard supplemental data (skip PSV); non-standard data requires Primary Source Verification.
authorities.summary_es: Los flujos de datos validados cuentan como datos suplementarios estándar (omiten PSV); los datos no estándar requieren Verificación de Fuente Primaria (PSV).

authorities.title: CAHPS / ECHO survey administration
authorities.summary: Plan must use an NCQA-Certified survey vendor for CAHPS (Adult/Child) and ECHO (behavioral health); cannot self-administer.
authorities.title_es: Administración de encuestas CAHPS / ECHO
authorities.summary_en: Plan must use an NCQA-Certified survey vendor for CAHPS (Adult/Child) and ECHO (behavioral health); cannot self-administer.
authorities.summary_es: El plan debe usar un proveedor de encuestas certificado por NCQA para CAHPS (Adulto/Niño) y ECHO (salud conductual); no puede autoadministrarlas.

authorities.title: IDSS submission & Patient-Level Data (PLD)
authorities.summary: Web submission of audited HEDIS results (IDSS) and member-level detail (PLD) on the annual timeline.
authorities.title_es: Someter IDSS y Datos a Nivel de Paciente (PLD)
authorities.summary_en: Web submission of audited HEDIS results (IDSS) and member-level detail (PLD) on the annual timeline.
authorities.summary_es: Sometimiento web de resultados HEDIS auditados (IDSS) y detalle a nivel de afiliado (PLD) en el calendario anual.

authorities.title: Hybrid retirement (MY2029) & all-digital (MY2030)
authorities.summary: Proposed timeline: hybrid method retired by MY2029; HEDIS fully digital (FHIR/CQL) by MY2030. Drives ECDS/digital readiness.
authorities.title_es: Retiro del método híbrido (MY2029) y HEDIS totalmente digital (MY2030)
authorities.summary_en: Proposed timeline: hybrid method retired by MY2029; HEDIS fully digital (FHIR/CQL) by MY2030. Drives ECDS/digital readiness.
authorities.summary_es: Cronograma propuesto: el método híbrido se retira para el MY2029; HEDIS totalmente digital (FHIR/CQL) para el MY2030. Impulsa la preparación ECDS/digital.

authorities.title: FHIR/CQL standards for digital HEDIS
authorities.summary: HL7 FHIR R4 + Clinical Quality Language, per the HEDIS FHIR Implementation Guide — the technical basis of the digital engine.
authorities.title_es: Estándares FHIR/CQL para HEDIS digital
authorities.summary_en: HL7 FHIR R4 + Clinical Quality Language, per the HEDIS FHIR Implementation Guide — the technical basis of the digital engine.
authorities.summary_es: HL7 FHIR R4 + Clinical Quality Language, según la Guía de Implementación FHIR de HEDIS — la base técnica del motor digital.

authorities.title: HIPAA-adopted standard: ASC X12N 835 (005010X221A1)
authorities.title_es: Estándar adoptado por HIPAA: ASC X12N 835 (005010X221A1)
authorities.summary: Adopts the 835 v.005010X221A1 as the HIPAA standard for health-care claim payment / electronic remittance advice (ERA).
authorities.summary_en: Adopts the 835 v.005010X221A1 as the HIPAA standard for health-care claim payment / electronic remittance advice (ERA).
authorities.summary_es: Adopta el 835 v.005010X221A1 como el estándar HIPAA para el pago de reclamaciones de salud / aviso de remesa electrónica (ERA).

authorities.title: 835 Health Care Claim Payment/Advice — implementation guide (TR3)
authorities.title_en: 835 Health Care Claim Payment/Advice — implementation guide (TR3)
authorities.title_es: Aviso de Pago/Remesa de Reclamación de Salud 835 — guía de implementación (TR3)
authorities.summary: The X12 technical report (TR3) defining the 835 segment/loop structure for remittance and CARC/RARC placement. Licensed from X12/WPC.
authorities.summary_en: The X12 technical report (TR3) defining the 835 segment/loop structure for remittance and CARC/RARC placement. Licensed from X12/WPC.
authorities.summary_es: Reporte técnico de X12 (TR3) que define la estructura de segmentos/loops del 835 para la remesa y la ubicación de CARC/RARC. Licenciado por X12/WPC.

authorities.title: 837 Institutional — implementation guide (TR3)
authorities.title_es: 837 Institucional — guía de implementación (TR3)
authorities.summary: X12 TR3 for the institutional (UB-04) claim/encounter transaction — the target format the OCR pipeline generates. Licensed from X12/WPC.
authorities.summary_en: X12 TR3 for the institutional (UB-04) claim/encounter transaction — the target format the OCR pipeline generates. Licensed from X12/WPC.
authorities.summary_es: TR3 de X12 para la transacción de reclamación/encuentro institucional (UB-04) — el formato destino que genera el pipeline de OCR. Licenciado por X12/WPC.

authorities.title: 837 Professional — implementation guide (TR3)
authorities.title_es: 837 Profesional — guía de implementación (TR3)
authorities.summary: X12 TR3 for the professional (CMS-1500) claim/encounter transaction. Licensed from X12/WPC.
authorities.summary_en: X12 TR3 for the professional (CMS-1500) claim/encounter transaction. Licensed from X12/WPC.
authorities.summary_es: TR3 de X12 para la transacción de reclamación/encuentro profesional (CMS-1500). Licenciado por X12/WPC.

authorities.title: 999 Implementation Acknowledgment — guide (TR3)
authorities.title_es: Acuse de Implementación 999 — guía (TR3)
authorities.summary: X12 TR3 for the 999 that acknowledges syntactic acceptance/rejection of a received 837 interchange. Licensed from X12/WPC.
authorities.summary_en: X12 TR3 for the 999 that acknowledges syntactic acceptance/rejection of a received 837 interchange. Licensed from X12/WPC.
authorities.summary_es: TR3 de X12 para el 999 que acusa la aceptación/rechazo sintáctico de un intercambio 837 recibido. Licenciado por X12/WPC.

authorities.title: 277CA Claim Acknowledgment — guide (TR3)
authorities.title_es: Acuse de Reclamación 277CA — guía (TR3)
authorities.summary: X12 TR3 for the 277CA that reports claim-level acceptance/rejection (business edits) back to the submitter. Licensed from X12/WPC.
authorities.summary_en: X12 TR3 for the 277CA that reports claim-level acceptance/rejection (business edits) back to the submitter. Licensed from X12/WPC.
authorities.summary_es: TR3 de X12 para el 277CA que reporta la aceptación/rechazo a nivel de reclamación (validaciones de negocio) al remitente. Licenciado por X12/WPC.

authorities.title: Timely claims payment (Medicaid)
authorities.title_es: Pago oportuno de reclamaciones (Medicaid)
authorities.summary: Medicaid timely-payment standard: 90% of clean claims paid within 30 days and 99% within 90 days of receipt.
authorities.summary_en: Medicaid timely-payment standard: 90% of clean claims paid within 30 days and 99% within 90 days of receipt.
authorities.summary_es: Estándar de pago oportuno de Medicaid: 90% de las reclamaciones limpias pagadas dentro de 30 días y 99% dentro de 90 días del recibo.

authorities.title: CAQH CORE EFT/ERA (835) operating rules
authorities.title_es: Reglas de operación CAQH CORE EFT/ERA (835)
authorities.summary: Phase III CAQH CORE operating rules for EFT/ERA — uniform CARC/RARC combinations and EFT/ERA reassociation; adopted federally under 45 CFR §162.1203.
authorities.summary_en: Phase III CAQH CORE operating rules for EFT/ERA — uniform CARC/RARC combinations and EFT/ERA reassociation; adopted federally under 45 CFR §162.1203.
authorities.summary_es: Reglas de operación CAQH CORE Fase III para EFT/ERA — combinaciones uniformes de CARC/RARC y reasociación EFT/ERA; adoptadas federalmente bajo 45 CFR §162.1203.

authorities.title: HIPAA Administrative Simplification — Privacy, Security & Breach Notification
authorities.title_en: HIPAA Administrative Simplification — Privacy, Security & Breach Notification
authorities.title_es: Simplificación Administrativa de HIPAA — Privacidad, Seguridad y Notificación de Brechas
authorities.summary: Umbrella Part covering the HIPAA Privacy (Subpart E), Security (Subpart C) and Breach Notification (Subpart D) Rules for PHI/ePHI. RL-F23 (§164.502) and RL-F24 (§164.312) are specific sections within it.
authorities.summary_en: Umbrella Part covering the HIPAA Privacy (Subpart E), Security (Subpart C) and Breach Notification (Subpart D) Rules for PHI/ePHI. RL-F23 (§164.502) and RL-F24 (§164.312) are specific sections within it.
authorities.summary_es: Parte paraguas que abarca las Reglas de Privacidad (Subpart E), Seguridad (Subpart C) y Notificación de Brechas (Subpart D) de HIPAA para PHI/ePHI. RL-F23 (§164.502) y RL-F24 (§164.312) son secciones específicas dentro de ella.

authorities.title: NUBC UB-04 institutional claim form & code sets
authorities.title_en: NUBC UB-04 institutional claim form & code sets
authorities.title_es: Formulario institucional UB-04 de la NUBC y sus conjuntos de códigos
authorities.summary: National Uniform Billing Committee UB-04 (CMS-1450) form layout and code sets (revenue codes, condition/occurrence/value codes, FL locators). The paper/field standard whose electronic equivalent is the X12 837I; the source of truth for institutional field extraction.
authorities.summary_en: National Uniform Billing Committee UB-04 (CMS-1450) form layout and code sets (revenue codes, condition/occurrence/value codes, FL locators). The paper/field standard whose electronic equivalent is the X12 837I; the source of truth for institutional field extraction.
authorities.summary_es: Diseño del formulario UB-04 (CMS-1450) del National Uniform Billing Committee y sus conjuntos de códigos (revenue codes, códigos de condición/ocurrencia/valor, localizadores FL). El estándar de papel/campos cuyo equivalente electrónico es el X12 837I; fuente de verdad para la extracción de campos institucionales.

authorities.title: NUCC CMS-1500 professional claim form
authorities.title_es: Formulario profesional CMS-1500 de la NUCC
authorities.summary: National Uniform Claim Committee CMS-1500 (02/12) form layout and item definitions (e.g. items 9 and 11 for other/primary insurance). The paper/field standard whose electronic equivalent is the X12 837P.
authorities.summary_en: National Uniform Claim Committee CMS-1500 (02/12) form layout and item definitions (e.g. items 9 and 11 for other/primary insurance). The paper/field standard whose electronic equivalent is the X12 837P.
authorities.summary_es: Diseño del formulario CMS-1500 (02/12) del National Uniform Claim Committee y sus definiciones de ítems (p.ej. ítems 9 y 11 para seguro primario/otro). El estándar de papel/campos cuyo equivalente electrónico es el X12 837P.

authorities.title: HIPAA medical data code sets (ICD-10-CM/PCS, CPT, HCPCS)
authorities.title_en: HIPAA medical data code sets (ICD-10-CM/PCS, CPT, HCPCS)
authorities.title_es: Conjuntos de códigos médicos de HIPAA (ICD-10-CM/PCS, CPT, HCPCS)
authorities.summary: Adopts the medical data code sets for HIPAA transactions: ICD-10-CM (diagnoses), ICD-10-PCS (inpatient procedures), CPT/HCPCS (services), and code sets used on the UB-04/1500 and 837.
authorities.summary_en: Adopts the medical data code sets for HIPAA transactions: ICD-10-CM (diagnoses), ICD-10-PCS (inpatient procedures), CPT/HCPCS (services), and code sets used on the UB-04/1500 and 837.
authorities.summary_es: Adopta los conjuntos de códigos médicos para las transacciones HIPAA: ICD-10-CM (diagnósticos), ICD-10-PCS (procedimientos de internación), CPT/HCPCS (servicios) y los conjuntos usados en el UB-04/1500 y el 837.
